productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Blue Capris
description: Style Note Room to grow style capris for your little girl from gini and jony. Designed for her comfort and tailored to Fit her growing body - now that should make you and your little one happy. Buy this before stocks run out! Product Details A pair of blue denim pedal pushers, has two insert pockets in the front with one small patch pocket above the right pocket with colourful thread detailing, two patch pockets at the back with thread detailing, a brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back, loops at the waistband for a belt, a white belt and a zipper and button closure Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold using a mild detergent inside out with like colours Do not tumble dry Do not iron over on decor Remove all accessories before washing
